item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v0.19.2
item.description:
New Features

  • Added comprehensive secret protection system with PreToolUse hooks that block direct reads of secret files (cat, grep, head, tail) and command-specific execpolicy rules for Codex CLI that prevent grep/awk access to known secret key names
  • Secret consumers now support 1Password op:// reference resolution alongside plain values, enabling gradual migration from plaintext secret files to vault-backed references
  • PreToolUse command rewriting automatically redacts secrets from tool output before transcript capture, with regex detection for AWS keys, Slack tokens, JWTs, and PEM headers plus gitleaks integration for high-entropy patterns
  • Bootstrap and git hooks now stand down when roster sync owns the machine, preventing catalog conflicts during the roster-926 cutover (override with ROSTER_ROLLBACK=1)

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed argv-position-aware execpolicy rules for grep/awk commands where the search pattern precedes the file path, closing the specific leak vector that bypassed original prefix-based rules
  • Scratchpad entries now use millisecond-precision IDs to prevent collisions when multiple entries are added within the same second
  • Bridge-retro artifact publishing resolves ~/.secrets via op run instead of direct sourcing, ensuring 1Password references work correctly in the publish pipeline
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:feat, conventional:fix, conventional:refactor, migration, security) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.19.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Skills subsystem now pins landmark dependency to the @v0 pre-stable line instead of @v1, preventing version conflicts for new agent adoptions
  • Release workflow templates switch to default GitHub workflow token with explicit permissions blocks, removing custom token setup requirements
  • Shape skill templates updated to aesthetic v0.24.0, ensuring compatibility with latest styling framework
  • Misty-landmark skill documentation expanded with current workflow token guidance for smoother integration
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found user-visible commit signals but model did not; deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.19.0
item.description:
New Features

Generated Sanctum artifacts now include a home link back to the portal, and authored HTML artifacts automatically receive this affordance when missing.

Artifact publishing maintains a live index at /a/index/ with both human-readable tables and machine-readable JSON, enabling discovery through the Bridge deck's Fresh Off the Shelf integration.

Starred artifacts appear first in the shelf index, with registry entries now tracking star status from the live stars store and sorting starred items above unstarred ones.

Bridge retro reports can now be triggered via /api/bridge-retro with configurable time windows, running detached and self-announcing completion through feed posts.

Bug Fixes

Bridge retro processes resolve OPENROUTER_API_KEY at runtime from keychain instead of relying on unavailable launch context secrets.

Shelf index tables now properly wrap in scroll containers on narrow viewports, preventing column cutoff on mobile devices.

Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:build, conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:feat, conventional:fix, security) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found security signals but model did not

]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.16.2
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Bridge-answer relay now correctly routes through sanctum origin following the powder cutover, resolving artifact delivery failures in distributed agent configurations.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:fix, migration) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found migration signals but model did not

]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.16.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Bootstrap process now correctly resolves Claude hook binary location, preventing installation failures when the hook path couldn't be determined at runtime.
Release classification notes

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:fix) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor prevented low-significance skip

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.11.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now run security advisory checks through the cargo-deny advisories quality gate, which scans for known vulnerabilities in Rust dependencies with 118 scoped advisory rules.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed root-skill sparse checkout failures during external sync operations by decomposing the git plumbing layer for more reliable repository synchronization.
]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.10.1
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now use the cargo-deny advisories quality gate to automatically scan for security vulnerabilities in Rust dependencies with 118 pre-configured advisory checks

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed external skill synchronization failing when using sparse checkout for root-skill repositories by decomposing the underlying git operations
  • Fixed git plumbing operations that were causing sync failures during agent skill acquisition
]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.10.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now verify premise-source consistency through the restored CLI contract, enabling direct validation of agent reasoning chains
  • You can now validate API boot sequences and SDK builds through integrated template checks, ensuring harness reliability during agent initialization

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed bootstrap process leaving dangling worktree symlinks that could interfere with subsequent agent installations

Landmark classification notice: deterministic release signals (conventional:chore, conventional:docs, conventional:feat, dependency, migration) disagreed with model classification; synthesis proceeded. deterministic floor found migration signals but model did not

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.9.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed bootstrap process leaving dangling worktree symlinks that could interfere with agent workspace initialization and cause file system conflicts during subsequent harness operations.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.9.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now generate focused repo-local skills for domain agents using harness-engineering, enabling customized skill sets tailored to specific project contexts
  • You can now use the CI-instantiated one-core-many-faces template for streamlined project scaffolding across different deployment targets
  • You can now bootstrap agents with role-scoped bundles (lead/implementer/critic/designer/vault), providing specialized skill sets based on agent responsibilities
  • You can now wire eval-coverage gates with seed hot-skill evaluations, establishing quality control for skill performance and coverage metrics

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed installed CLI self-update blind spot in bootstrap process that prevented proper version management
  • Fixed telemetry classification to properly distinguish between direct vs routed skill invocations for accurate usage tracking
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.8.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now install role-scoped bundles for lead, implementer, critic, designer, and vault personas during bootstrap.
  • You can now generate domain-specific skills focused on repository context for agents working in specialized environments.
  • You can now use CI-instantiated one-core-many-faces templates for consistent project scaffolding across different deployment targets.
  • The harness now includes an eval-coverage gate with seed evaluations for hot-skill assessment and A/B testing framework for skill performance validation.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed bootstrap CLI self-update detection issue that prevented proper version management during installation.
  • Fixed telemetry classification to properly distinguish between direct skill invocations and routed delegations for accurate usage tracking.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.7.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed bootstrap CLI self-update mechanism that was failing to detect available updates after initial installation. The bootstrap process now correctly identifies and applies CLI updates during harness maintenance cycles.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.7.0
item.description:
New Features

  • You can now generate focused repo-local skills tailored to domain agents using harness-engineering capabilities, automatically creating context-aware skills for specific project domains and workflows.

  • You can now use CI-instantiated project templates through the one-core-many-faces pattern, providing standardized scaffolding for multi-surface applications with consistent architecture.

  • You can now access role-scoped skill bundles for specialized agent types (lead, implementer, critic, designer, vault), allowing targeted capability deployment based on agent responsibilities.

  • The eval system now includes skill evaluation coverage gates and hot-skill evaluation seeding, providing automated quality assurance for agent capabilities with A/B testing framework integration.

]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.6.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now CI-instantiate the one-core-many-faces template, enabling automated template deployment across different harness configurations.
  • You can now use role-scoped bundles for bootstrap (lead/implementer/critic/designer/vault), allowing targeted skill distribution based on agent roles.
  • The telemetry system now classifies skill invocations as direct vs routed, providing better insight into agent execution patterns.
  • You can now wire eval-coverage gates with seeded hot-skill evaluations, establishing automated quality thresholds for skill deployment.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.5.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now configure agent harnesses with role-scoped skill bundles (lead, implementer, critic, designer, vault) for targeted capability distribution
  • The skills system now includes an eval-coverage gate that requires evaluation metrics for skill deployment, plus A/B evaluation framework for comparing skill performance
  • You can now generate artifact reports from skill execution to track deliverable quality and completion status
  • The template system now includes baked-in Fly Litestream deployment configuration for streamlined production setup
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.4.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now gate skill evaluation coverage before deployment. The eval-coverage gate ensures skills have comprehensive test coverage, and hot-skill evaluations are seeded during skill registration for rapid quality feedback.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed telemetry classification to distinguish between direct skill invocations versus routed skill calls. Skill execution tracking now properly categorizes invocation paths for accurate performance monitoring and debugging.
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.3.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now evaluate skills with the skill-eval A/B framework that includes shape evaluation for testing skill effectiveness and comparison
  • You can now generate artifact reports for skills, providing documentation and analysis of skill outputs and performance
  • You can now deploy with the Fly Litestream layer baked into templates for streamlined database replication and deployment
  • Fixed roster lane dispatch to properly handle bounded routing and prevent dispatch failures
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.2.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now generate structured reports of agent work artifacts using the new artifact report generator skill
  • You can now deploy projects with baked-in Fly Litestream configuration through the enhanced template system
  • The roster lane dispatch system now includes proper bounds checking to prevent execution errors
  • Fixed bootstrap configuration to correctly distinguish between empty allowlists and missing keys when parsing skill permissions
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.1.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now deploy to Fly.io with built-in Litestream database replication using the template layer
  • You can now bootstrap harnesses with expanded global coverage (13 skills + 4 agents) and skill allowlisting via .spellbook.yaml
  • You can now generate project-specific skills using /harness scaffold mode for local QA automation
  • You can now track agent work sessions and skill invocations through the new trace system with PostToolUse hooks

Improvements

  • The bootstrap process now resolves .spellbook.yaml from git root instead of current directory, fixing path resolution issues
  • The roster dispatch system now properly bounds lane targeting to specific repositories, preventing cross-repo conflicts
  • The CI pipeline now excludes skills/.external from source context and rejects unresolved conflict markers
  • The skill discovery system now scans the filesystem directly instead of relying on registry files for better reliability
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.0.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now use the /deps skill for semantic dependency management with reachability analysis
  • You can now leverage agent-first workflow capabilities including distributed issue tracking via git-bug, Dagger CI integration, and atomic claim protocols
  • You can now scaffold project-local harness configurations using /harness scaffold mode for QA skill generation and demo templates
  • You can now access consolidated global skills (74 skills from 262) with budget-aware selection and multi-provider code review support across Thinktank, Codex, and Gemini

Improvements

  • The bootstrap system now resolves .spellbook.yaml from git toplevel instead of current directory and honors skill allowlists for cleaner installations
  • The focus system now includes second-stage selection heuristics and selection telemetry for better skill targeting across harnesses
  • The tailor system now supports cross-harness installation with canonical .agents/ directories and per-harness symlinks for unified agent management
  • The verdict system now enforces git-native review workflows with persistent scoring and evidence-based quality gates

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed autopilot workflow to create feature branches before spawning builders and stop before merge with LGTM protocol instead of auto-merge
  • Fixed roster lane dispatch scoping to target repositories and bound dispatch execution to prevent incorrect routing
  • Fixed CI gates to exclude skills/.external from source context and reject unresolved conflict markers during validation
  • Fixed skill discovery to use filesystem scanning instead of registry.yaml and properly handle external skill synchronization
]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]]]>]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>
